mnemonics: FILMS: Focus on Interactive Learning Modules for Success
keyPoints: Review the core textbook chapters for foundational concepts
Complete the practical coding exercises in the provided Jupyter notebooks
Watch the instructor's video lectures on advanced model diagnostics
commonMistakes: Skipping the hands-on exercises and relying solely on theoretical reading
Assuming all resources are optional rather than complementary to each other
Not using the discussion forum to clarify doubts about the applied examples
